name: Maslavi Construction Company Ltd
summary: Maslavi Construction Company Ltd operates in the construction and real estate industry in Israel. The company develops, constructs, markets, and sells residential, commercial, industrial, and employment buildings, as well as commercial centers and public institutions; owns and manages rental and commercial properties; and undertakes urban renewal/evacuation construction works. It also maintains and manages office and commercial properties. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Kiryat Ono, Israel.
